1|/**

     4| * This file is the single source of truth for OWNER-FACING variable metadata

     8| * providers without ever exposing or logging a secret.
     9| *
    10| * Fields:
    11| *  - name: env var name as it appears in Render / Supabase / etc.
    12| *  - category: high-level grouping for the UI
    13| *  - sourceLocation: where the canonical value lives (where the owner edits it)
    14| *  - provider: provider category the credential belongs to
    15| *  - secret: true if the value must NEVER be displayed (only masked)
    16| *  - isPublic: true for EXPO_PUBLIC_* / VITE_* (inlined to client)
    17| *  - required: true if production needs this credential right now
    18| *  - devOnly: true if this is only used in dev / preview builds
    19| *  - rollbackOnly: true if kept around for rollback to the previous deploy
    20| *  - safeToRemove: true if scheduled for cleanup once IVX backend takes over
    21| *  - featureUnlocked: human label describing what this credential enables
    22| *  - actionRequired: short message for owner action, null if nothing to do
    23| *  - ownerActionNeeded: true if the owner must explicitly do something
    24| *  - description: short copy shown under the variable name
